creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Comment on attachment 180705
proposed-patch-security_softhsm2

Apologies for the delays, I'm traveling ...

I have ben told that softhsm2 doesn't has LibreSSL yet.

I also noticed that it is broken OpenSSL 1.1.0 because GOST support
is now in a separate engine which is not installed by openssl.  I
will ask the upstream for the plans in regarding LibreSSL and
OpenSSL >= 1.1.0 support.

I prefer to wait on official support above hacking it in by ourselves.
I'll have a look at the proposed changes anyway.
